description.content: Manage virtual servers that direct client traffic to appropriate server pools based on configured rules and profiles.
Returns a collection of all virtual server resources configured on the BIG-IP system.

query.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include in the response.
OData filter expression to restrict returned resources.
Maximum number of resources to return.
Number of resources to skip before returning results.
When set to true, expands all subcollections inline within the response.

variable.description: Hostname or IP address of the BIG-IP device

response.name: Successful retrieval of virtual server collection.

variable.description: Hostname or IP address of the BIG-IP device

The iControl REST API provides programmatic access to manage and configure F5 BIG-IP devices. It enables automation of Local Traffic Manager (LTM) resources including virtual servers, pools, nodes, pool members, and profiles for application delivery, load balancing, and network management.

Contact Support:
 Name: F5 Support
 Email: support@f5.com
